_comment: RECOMMENDED PRODUCTION PATH for Elastic Beanstalk: deploy a PREBUILT image
from ECR instead of building on the instance. This file is a TEMPLATE and is
intentionally NOT at the repo root (a root Dockerrun.aws.json would override
the root Dockerfile). To use it: build + push the API image in CI (see
.github/workflows/deploy.yml), then create an EB bundle whose ROOT is a copy
of THIS file with <ACCOUNT> / <REGION> / <TAG> filled in, plus .ebextensions/.
Replace the on-instance-build root Dockerfile approach with this once ECR is set up.
